title: EEG: Simon Conflict w/ Reinforcement + Cabergoline Challenge
description: This dataset comprises electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from two studies investigating the Simon conflict task with reinforcement-based cost manipulation. Study 1 included 83 healthy participants (80 plus 5 placebo controls from a pilot phase), while Study 2 involved 27 healthy participants in a double-blind design receiving either cabergoline (1.25 mg) or placebo. The dataset provides insights into neural mechanisms of conflict processing and decision-making under pharmacological modulation.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during a Simon conflict task with reinforcement manipulation. Study 1 consisted of 83 healthy participants (80 participants plus 5 placebo sessions from a pilot drug study). Study 2 was a double-blind, placebo-controlled study with 30 participants enrolled (27 completed; 3 dropouts), receiving cabergoline 1.25 mg or placebo. Data were collected circa 2012-2013 at the Laboratory for Neural Computation & Cognition at Brown University.
